sentences.arabic: غَسْلُ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالْمَاءِ وَالصَّابُونِ يَحْمِي مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Pranje ruku vodom i sapunom štiti od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Washing hands with water and soap protects against diseases.

sentences.arabic: نَظَافَةُ الْأَسْنَانِ ضَرُورِيَّةٌ بَعْدَ تَنَاوُلِ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Higijena zuba je neophodna nakon jela.
sentences.translationEn: Dental hygiene is necessary after eating.

sentences.arabic: الْوِقَايَةُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْعِلَاجِ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Preventiva je bolja od liječenja u svako doba.
sentences.translationEn: Prevention is better than cure at all times.
